overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long NVDA Daily ETF (NVDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of NVIDIA stock, less fees, and expenses. NVDG was launched on Dec 13, 2024 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
